name: x402-error-facilitator-unreachable
description: Golden fixture for HTTP 502 X402_FACILITATOR_UNREACHABLE with subcause=cert_pin_mismatch (Hub's TLS handshake to the facilitator failed because the presented cert's SPKI hash does not match the pinned value — simulated MITM or unauthorized cert rotation).
scenario: facilitator presents wrong TLS cert; Hub aborts at handshake, fails closed

facilitator_calls.tls_handshake: FAIL — presented cert SPKI sha256=<observed> ≠ pinned=<expected>

error.message: x402 facilitator at https://x402.org/facilitator presented an unexpected TLS certificate; settlement aborted. Operator has been notified.

next_action.hint: x402 settlement is currently unavailable due to a security signal on the facilitator. Top up the wallet to continue.

postconditions: x402_settlements has NO row for this request_id
Hub audit_log records `x402.facilitator.cert_pin_mismatch` with the observed and expected SPKI hashes (the operator alert is P0 — facilitator may be compromised)
operator runbook: investigate before re-enabling x402; flip kill switch via feature_flags.x402_enabled = false until cleared
